title: Terralith: No Structures
description: An official add-on to Terralith that removes all custom structures
body:
## Terralith: No Structures

This is an add-on to Terralith that removes all custom structures. Pretty self-explanitory.

If using the datapack version, make sure it loads above normal Terralith. The mod version should automatically load it in the correct order.

If using Terralith 2.6.0+, this add-on is unnecessary. You can disable structure via Terralith's built-in config.

### FAQ
**Q.** Will there be a way to disable only certain structures?

**A.** No, not with this add-on. The alternative solution is to use [Structurify](https://modrinth.com/mod/structurify) if you're able to use mods.
